lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: These dungeons are such a maze.

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: I've been wandering around down here for hours.

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: How can I get back to the village?

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Where am I? I'm so lost.

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: I know the exit is around here, somewhere.

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: This is the fifth time this week! I'm lost!

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: How could I be so disoriented?
